description: Manual test specification for 11 bug-fixes-and-data-integrity playbook scenarios: graph channel ID fix, chunk collapse deduplication, co-activation fan-effect divisor, SHA-256 content-hash deduplication, database and schema safety, guards and edge cases, canonical ID dedup hardening, Math.max/min stack overflow elimination, session-manager transaction gap fixes, chunking safe swap atomicity, and SQLite datetime session cleanup.
title: Manual Testing: Bug Fixes and Data Integrity
short_description: Manual test execution for 11 bug-fix and data-integrity scenarios from the hybrid-rag-fusion playbook
